channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iraqi National Charged in U.S. with Terrorism Connected to Toronto Consulate Shooting
item.description: Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi, a 32-year-old Iraqi national, is now in U.S. custody facing six terrorism-related charges, including conspiring to support terrorist acts and attempting to murder ...

item.title: Cosmo Industries Celebrates Disability Service Professionals Week in Saskatoon
item.description: Cosmo Industries in Saskatoon has been supporting individuals with intellectual disabilities since 1971, providing them with meaningful work opportunities and community programming. More than 400 part...

item.title: UAE condemns drone strike near Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, no casualties reported
item.description: On Sunday, a drone strike in Abu Dhabi caused a fire near the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, though fortunately no one was injured and radiation levels were unaffected. The UAE authorities confirmed tha...

item.title: BJP claims recovery of voter ID and Aadhaar cards from TMC offices in West Bengal
item.description: In West Bengal, several Trinamool Congress (TMC) offices were found to contain hundreds of voter IDs, Aadhaar cards, and MNREG Scheme job cards. These documents, recovered by local residents and Bhara...

item.title: Four Navy jet crew members safely eject after crash at Idaho air show
item.description: During an air show in Idaho, two Navy jets collided mid-flight, resulting in both aircraft crashing. Fortunately, all four crew members were able to eject safely and were reported to be unharmed. The ...

item.title: Cape Town Marathon 2026: Road closures, transport plans and spectator guide
item.description: The Sanlam Cape Town Marathon will take place on 24 May 2026, linking Green Point, the CBD, Woodstock, Salt River, Observatory, the Southern Suburbs, and Sea Point. Several major roads, including Hele...

item.title: Authorities Increase Efforts to Locate Missing 14-Year-Old in North York
item.description: Toronto police have intensified their search efforts following the disappearance of a 14-year-old girl from North York. The incident has raised concerns among local residents and prompted authorities ...

item.title: K-pop Artists Taeyang, Taeyong, and ITZY Set to Release New Songs on May 18
item.description: Fans of K-pop are in for an exciting week as several prominent artists are set to release new music on May 18. Among those dropping new tracks are Taeyang, the renowned vocalist from BIGBANG; Taeyong,...

item.title: Senate pushes for state police to improve school security after kidnappings in Borno and Oyo
item.description: The Senate Leader, Opeyemi Bamidele, don sharply condemn the recent abduction of students and teachers in Borno and Oyo states, calling the attacks serious threat to Nigeria’s future and national deve...

item.title: Trump issues warning to Iran ahead of national prayer event
item.description: On May 17, 2026, President Donald Trump made a highly controversial statement directed at Iran just before attending a national prayer event in Washington, D.C. On his social media platform Truth Soci...

item.title: Israeli military maintained two secret bases in Iraq’s western desert
item.description: According to a report by the New York Times, Israeli forces operated at least two covert military bases in Iraq’s western desert. These bases were reportedly used to support military operations agains...

item.title: Edmonton councillor proposes renaming street to 'Forever Canadian' to promote unity
item.description: An Edmonton city councillor, Michael Janz, has proposed renaming a portion of 99th Avenue near the Alberta legislature to 'Forever Canadian Avenue' as a way to promote patriotism and support for Canad...

item.title: GeLex and FranSeth impress audiences with their performances on ASAP XP
item.description: On the latest episode of ASAP XP, the young Filipino stars GeLex and FranSeth displayed their remarkable chemistry as on-screen tandems. Fans were treated to energetic performances, showcasing both th...

item.title: Trump-Xi Summit: Working Towards Managed Stability in US-China Relations
item.description: The recent summit between President Donald Trump and President Xi Jinping in Beijing was largely ceremonial but carried underlying strategic importance. The meeting was primarily aimed at managing sup...

item.title: Rising Cross-Border Terrorism and Pakistan-Afghanistan Tensions
item.description: After months of declining terrorist incidents in March and April, Pakistan has witnessed a worrying surge in attacks originating from Afghan territory. From May 9 onwards, terrorists targeted police a...

item.title: Pedro Pascal surprises Disneyland visitors as the Mandalorian ahead of new film release
item.description: Pedro Pascal, known for his role as the Mandalorian in the Disney+ series, made a surprise appearance at Disneyland on Saturday, delighting fans aboard the Millennium Falcon: Smuggler’s Run ride. Dres...

item.title: NDLEA Seizes Drugs Concealed in Clothes, Garri and Farmlands Across Nigeria
item.description: Operatives of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) don intercept plenty drugs wey dem hide for different places like cartons of clothes, garri, and farmlands across Nigeria. For Lagos, dem...

item.title: International University of Management to Launch 120-Bed Hospital and Training Facility Near Ondangwa by 2027
item.description: The International University of Management (IUM), led by founder and chairperson David Namwandi, announced plans to establish a 120-bed private hospital near Ondangwa, expected to open by mid-2027. Th...

item.title: Rising Hypertension Cases Among Adults Under 45 in Gauteng Prompt Health Alerts
item.description: The Gauteng Department of Health has raised concerns over a growing number of adults under 45 being diagnosed with hypertension, often referred to as the “silent killer”. During the 2025/26 financial ...

item.title: John Tongshinen defeats Yusuf Gagdi in Plateau APC primary election
item.description: For Plateau State, na big surprise don happen as Yusuf Gagdi, wey be one of the popular federal lawmakers and chairman of the House of Representatives Committee on Navy, lose him seat for the APC prim...
